description: Hyrule Agentic ISP Support is the umbrella Skill for x402-paid network facts that LLMs cannot infer: live reachability, DNS, BGP, mail deliverability, routing/path evidence, TLS, reputation, VoIP, NAT hints, speedtests, and AS215932-back...
title: Hyrule Agentic ISP Support Skill

description: Hyrule BGP Data provides free AS215932 status plus paid public/global BGP intelligence for agents.

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs read-only DNS, DNSSEC, propagation, RDAP, WHOIS, registrar/delegation, or record-publication guidance.

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs to diagnose missing, rejected, delayed, or spam-filtered email for any public domain. This Skill is a marketing/support wrapper over the canonical `/v1/mx` API.
title: Hyrule Mail Deliverability Skill

description: Hyrule Agent Mail is the planned paid mailbox product for AI agents. The API contract is stable now; the backend adapter can be Stalwart, Postfix/Dovecot, Rspamd, or another mail backend hidden behind this API.
title: Hyrule Agent Mail Skill

description: Hyrule MX Diagnostics is a paid, MXToolbox-compatible troubleshooting API for AI agents and ISP support automation. Hyrule implements the checks internally; it is not affiliated with MXToolbox and does not scrape MXToolbox.
title: Hyrule MX Diagnostics Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs server-side NAT or CGNAT hints for a customer. This MVP does not require browser/WebRTC/STUN participation.
title: Hyrule NAT/CGNAT Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud for paid, agent-friendly network intelligence primitives.
title: Hyrule Network Intelligence Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs to answer whether one declared public service is reachable from outside.
title: Hyrule Port Reachability Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs to decide whether an outage is likely customer LAN, AS215932, remote ISP, remote host, routing/BGP/RPKI, or inconclusive.
title: Hyrule Routing Path Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs throughput, latency, jitter, and path evidence between a client and Hyrule/AS215932 endpoints.
title: Hyrule Speedtest Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs open-source-first domain, IP, RBL, certificate transparency, RDAP/WHOIS, or reputation context.
title: Hyrule Threat Reputation Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs SIP DNS, SIP TLS, SIP OPTIONS, STUN/TURN, number carrier, CNAM, number spam reputation, or E911 diagnostic context.
title: Hyrule VoIP/SIP Skill

description: Use Hyrule Cloud when an AI agent needs live, paid evidence for public website reachability, TLS/certificate failures, HTTP behavior, security headers, and CDN/WAF hints.
title: Hyrule Web Reachability Skill

description: Deploy bare VMs, register domains, and manage DNS zones — all paid via x402 (USDC on Base).
